name: Golden Onion Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Dice 3 tablespoons butter and refrigerate.
3. In a large sauté pan, cook the onions in the remaining butter and oil over medium heat, gradually reducing to low heat for about 1 hour until the onions are very tender, golden, and reduced considerably in size. Stir continuously for the last 15 minutes; be careful not to let them burn.
4. Discard any burned parts. Sprinkle the onions with flour using a strainer or sifter and sauté another 2 or 3 minutes.
5. Beat the eggs and cream in a bowl with one-third of the cheese. Stir in the onions, then pour the mixture into the quiche shell. Sprinkle with remaining cheese and dot with diced butter.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until browned and set.
